t_ch: 我们去帮她吧。
t_en: Let's help her.

t_ch: 糟了，快走！
t_en: Argh, darn it! Quick, disperse!

t_ch: …欺软怕硬的渣滓！
t_en: Spineless thugs!

t_ch: 希儿小姐！呼，幸好你出手及时，感激不尽啊~
t_en: Miss Seele! Phew, it's a good thing you showed up when you did. My heartfelt thanks~

t_ch: 这帮流浪者还真够嚣张的，竟然敢在「地火」的地盘上动武——
t_en: These vagrants have got some nerve looking for trouble in Wildfire terri—

t_ch: 闭嘴吧桑博，这件事你也逃不了干系。「地火」现在有一堆麻烦事要处理，你非得在这时候添乱吗？
t_en: Shut it Sampo, this has "you" written all over it. Wildfire has countless issues on its plate right now. We don't need a side order of Koski.

t_ch: 我听说有个银鬃铁卫跑到下层区来了…是你么？
t_en: I hear a Silvermane Guard is paying the Underworld a visit... is that you?

t_ch: 你们把我绑架到地底，到底有什么企图？
t_en: You kidnapped me and brought me to the underground. What is the meaning of this?

t_ch: 哼，「到底有什么企图」…她以为自己还是上面的大小姐呢。
t_en: Hmph, listen to her. "What is the meaning of this?" ...She still thinks she's an Overworld princess.

t_ch: 待在地上很舒服吧？你们知道地下变成什么样了吗？你们有考虑过下层人的死活吗？
t_en: Do you know what's become of us down here while you live the easy life? Did you even consider the fate of the Underworlders?

t_ch: 银鬃铁卫不是「舒服」地待在地上。铁卫一直在与敌人战斗，从怪物手中保卫贝洛伯格…保护地上和地下的每个人。
t_en: The Silvermane Guards aren't "living the easy life." We are constantly engaged with the enemy — defending Belobog from the scourge of attacking monsters... and protecting all those above and below the surface.

t_ch: 嘿，说的比唱的还好听，你们保护了地下什么？把铁卫全调上去，封锁上下通路，说好听点还不是为了保护所谓的「筑城者」么？
t_en: Hah, do you even hear yourself? You? Protect the underground? Redeploying every Guard to the surface, sealing off the only passageway... Protecting the so-called Architects, more like it.

t_ch: 守护者大人有她的考量……
t_en: The Madam Guardian has her reasons...

t_ch: 哼。
t_en: Hmph.

t_ch: 总之，你跟我走一趟。奥列格头儿要见你，他好像有很多问题要问。
t_en: Enough talk, you're coming with me. Chief Oleg wants to see you, and he's got more than a few questions.

t_ch: 好巧啊，希儿小姐！我们也有事情想要拜会首领大人！搭个伙一起走呗？
t_en: Perfect, Miss Seele! We were just on our way to pay Chief Oleg a visit ourselves. Room for a few more?

t_ch: 谁要跟你搭伙。
t_en: Fully booked.

t_ch: …这几个人是谁？
t_en: ...Who are they?

t_ch: 我是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I'm {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: …光知道名字有什么用！
t_en: ...What good is your name by itself!

t_ch: 我是桑博的朋友。
t_en: I'm a friend of Sampo's.

t_ch: 他的朋友？那地下一大半是你的敌人了。
t_en: A friend of his? Then most of the underground is your enemy.

t_ch: 我是奥列格头儿的贵客。
t_en: I'm Oleg's guest.

t_ch: 你认识头儿？我怎么不认识你……
t_en: You know the chief? Then why don't I know you...

t_ch: 是这样的，这几位是头儿迫切需要的人才，我正要带他们去拜见奥列格……
t_en: Well it's like this: The chief's in the market for specific talent — an urgent request. So, I'm taking them to see him...

t_ch: 我们来这儿寻找一种叫「星核」的东西，它是所有灾难的罪魁祸首，只要找到它，我们就能——
t_en: We're looking for a Stellaron — it's the source of all the disasters here. If we find it, we can—

t_ch: 小姐姐，这事你也别见谁跟谁说啊，奥列格才是头儿，希儿小姐不懂这些的。
t_en: Ahaha — ahem! I would recommend you not recite your story to everyone you meet. Miss Seele won't understand it anyway, so let's save it for the chief, huh?

t_ch: 我是不懂，而且也没打算帮你们传话。「地火」在大矿区遇到了点麻烦，头儿正在忙着处理。你们要是真想见他，就到矿区入口来找我吧。
t_en: You're right, I don't understand it, and I don't plan on passing the message on either. Wildfire's encountered trouble at the Great Mine — the chief's busy. If you really want to find him, come look for me at the mine entrance.

t_ch: 走了。
t_en: I'm leaving.

t_ch: 嘿，来得挺快啊。
t_en: Hey, you came. That was fast.

t_ch: 地火在矿区做什么？
t_en: What is Wildfire doing in the mine?

t_ch: 地火遇到了什么麻烦？
t_en: What trouble has Wildfire gotten into?

t_ch: 原来我没说过么？唔，那长话短说：
t_en: Didn't I tell you? *sigh* Long story short —

t_ch: 地下原本有许多矿区，但是近几年一种叫裂界的侵蚀在地底蔓延，许多矿场都遭了殃，没法再开采了。
t_en: The underground used to have many mines. However, in recent years, some sort of corrosion called the "Fragmentum" started to spread. It's ruined a lot of mines.

t_ch: 我们要去的这片矿区保留得相对完整，环境还算干净。一群老家被裂界吞了的流浪者跑去那儿安了新家。其实这伙人嘛，大部分还算老实……
t_en: The one we're heading into is relatively unaffected. A bunch of vagrants made it their home after their old turf was consumed by the Fragmentum. Actually, most of them are pretty honest folks...

t_ch: 但人多了，免不了混进去些喜欢挑事的杂碎。结果就是：流浪者三天两头跟矿工干仗，还经常偷抢矿民的物资——这还算小打小闹。
t_en: But with such a large group, it's inevitable that troublemakers will find their way in. They've been stealing from the miners and picking fights. And that's not the worst of it.

t_ch: 这次的情况不一样…就这两天，矿工和流浪者间突然爆发了大规模的冲突，场面相当难看。
t_en: Things are much more serious this time... For two days now, huge clashes have been breaking out between the miners and the vagrants. It isn't pretty.

t_ch: 矿区是地底的生命线，必须保证地髓供给，我们才能从运输线拿到地上配给的物资。
t_en: Mines are our lifelines in the Underworld. We have to keep providing Geomarrow to the Overworld in exchange for supplies.

t_ch: 为了平息事态，奥列格首领带着「地火」扎进矿区，把城镇治安交给了我。但里面情况吃紧，我也得去支援……
t_en: In order to quell the situation, Chief Oleg brought Wildfire into the mine and left me in charge of security for the towns. But the situation in the mine is critical — I have to back him up.

t_ch: 没太听懂，你能再说一遍吗？
t_en: I don't think I understood, can you go over it again?

t_ch: 我明白了，出发吧。
t_en: Understood, let's go.

t_ch: 对了，还有你——等见到了首领，得让他决定该怎么处置你。
t_en: Oh, as for you... the Chief will decide your fate when we see him.

t_ch: 正好，我本来就想见见下层区的领导者。
t_en: Good, I've been wanting to come face to face with the leader of the Underworld.

t_ch: 哼，行啊，你也亲眼看看地下现在乱成了什么样吧。
t_en: Hmph, you're about to come face to face with reality.

t_ch: 咦？那不是医生姐姐吗？
t_en: Huh? Isn't that the doctor lady?

t_ch: 娜塔莎居然会出现在这儿…看来事态比想象中严重。
t_en: What's Natasha doing here...? Things must be worse than I thought.

t_ch: 跑不远的，那家伙！就在周围找找看吧。
t_en: That guy can't have gotten too far! Let's search nearby.

t_ch: （糟了，得跟紧虎克才行……）
t_en: Agh, gotta stick close to Hook...

t_ch: 娜塔！没想到连你都来了，奥列格去哪了？
t_en: Nat! I didn't think you'd be here. Where's Oleg?

t_ch: 嗨，希儿，还有…桑博的客人们。看来你们已经认识啦？
t_en: Hey Seele, and... Sampo's guests. So, it looks like you've already met.

t_ch: 我也没见着奥列格。矿民说看到他带一批人往深处去了。
t_en: I haven't seen Oleg. The miners said they saw him take a group further in.

t_ch: 这些人是…
t_en: These people...

t_ch: 矿民和家属，都是来找挑事的地痞讨说法的。
t_en: Miners and their family members. They want an explanation from the instigators.

t_ch: 这前面是流浪者的聚集地，现在入口被封起来了。估计是怕愤怒的矿民报复吧。
t_en: This area up ahead is a vagrant dwelling, but they've sealed off the entrance. I guess they're afraid that angry miners might try to take revenge.

t_ch: 听说冲突导致了不少人受伤，我就赶来看看能不能帮上忙。
t_en: *sigh* I heard that many were injured in the clashes, so I hurried over here to see if I could help.

t_ch: 你在这里做什么？
t_en: What are you doing here?

t_ch: 听说矿工和地痞起了激烈冲突，还有不少人受伤。我来看看能不能帮上忙。
t_en: I heard that the miners had been having violent clashes with local thugs, with significant numbers of wounded. I hurried over to see if I could help.

t_ch: 看见这些人了吗？都是矿民和矿民家属，他们是来跟挑事的地痞讨说法的。
t_en: You see these people? They're all miners and their family members. They want an explanation from the instigators.

t_ch: 这前面是流浪者的聚集地，现在入口被封起来了。估计是怕愤怒的矿民报复吧。
t_en: This area up ahead is a vagrant dwelling, but they've sealed off the entrance. I guess they're afraid that angry miners might try to take revenge.

t_ch: 我身体不大舒服…
t_en: I'm not feeling too good...

t_ch: 咦，看你气色挺好的呀？抱歉，我得先替伤重的人治疗。这几天矿工和地痞起了激烈冲突，还有不少人受伤。
t_en: Oh? You look fine to me. Sorry, I need to prioritize the wounded. There have been violent clashes between the miners and local thugs in the last few days — many people are injured.

t_ch: 看见这些人了吗？都是矿民和矿民家属，他们是来跟挑事的地痞讨说法的。
t_en: You see these people? They're all miners and their family members. They want an explanation from the instigators.

t_ch: 这前面是流浪者的聚集地，现在入口被封起来了。估计是怕愤怒的矿民报复吧。
t_en: This area up ahead is a vagrant dwelling, but they've sealed off the entrance. I guess they're afraid that angry miners might try to take revenge.

t_ch: 怎么会闹到这个地步？
t_en: How could the situation here become such a mess?

t_ch: 据说是第一矿队发现了一片「地髓」矿脉，储量惊人…初步估计，大概是近三十年发现的最大矿藏。
t_en: I heard that First Mining Team found a Geomarrow vein with incredible deposits... The initial estimate put it at the largest discovery in the last thirty years.

t_ch: 真的假的？这么大的新闻，我怎么一个字都没听说？
t_en: Are you serious? That's big news. How come I never heard about it?

t_ch: 他们才不想声张呢。大部分矿区都被裂界污染了，很多人都丢了工作。这消息要是传出去，怕不是矿工都要挤破头了。
t_en: Well, they weren't in a hurry to make it known. Most of the mines have been contaminated by the Fragmentum — many people are out of work. They were afraid of being overwhelmed if they let the word out.

t_ch: 但是矿队瞒不过这儿的流浪者，毕竟他们眼睛也不瞎。有些流氓地痞想借此捞一笔，向矿队勒索封口费…这就触犯了他们的底线。
t_en: But the vagrants here have keen eyes — they couldn't keep it hidden from them. Some local gangs wanted to profit from the situation, so they blackmailed the mining team for hush money... and that was the final straw.

t_ch: 这是保守秘密的代价。
t_en: That's the price of guarding a secret.

t_ch: 嗯…你的想法也不是不能理解。只不过，地底正处于艰难时期……
t_en: *sigh* ...I can understand your thinking. It's just that the underground is in difficult straits...

t_ch: 矿脉属于首个发现者。
t_en: The vein should belong to those who discovered it.

t_ch: 这确实是地下的法则，但流浪者们叫嚷着自己的规矩：见者有份。
t_en: As it happens, that's exactly the law we have down here. But the vagrants have their own custom: See it, share it.

t_ch: 结果就是两拨人发生了剧烈冲突，损失惨重。
t_en: And that's how the clash started. Now both sides are dealing with heavy losses.

t_ch: 你们来这里，是打算帮忙解决矿区的矛盾吗？
t_en: So, are you guys here to help resolve the conflict?

t_ch: 那倒不是他们的本意。这几个人有求于奥列格首领，所以我把他们带来了。
t_en: They're here because they need a favor from Chief Oleg. I'm escorting them.

t_ch: 既然有事相求，顺手帮个忙应该不算过分吧？
t_en: And seeing as you need that helping hand, it wouldn't be too much to ask you to lend one here first, right?

t_ch: …听上去咱们好功利啊！
t_en: Of course we wanna help... we care about other people too y'know.

t_ch: 我们是自愿主动来帮忙的。
t_en: We came here willing to help out.

t_ch: 喔…挺好心的嘛。
t_en: Oh... that's quite nice of you.

t_ch: 等价交换，这很合理。
t_en: Sounds like a fair trade off.

t_ch: 哼，是啊，天底下哪有无缘无故的善意。
t_en: Hmph, of course it is. Nobody gives without expecting something in return.

t_ch: 没兴趣，告辞。
t_en: Not interested, sorry.

t_ch: 随你，我可不会强求。
t_en: Suit yourself. I'm not forcing you.

t_ch: 哈哈，我觉得这几位都是心地善良的人哦。
t_en: Haha, I believe we're dealing with kind-hearted people here, Seele.

t_ch: 如你们所见，地底的情况真的…很艰难。如果方便的话，希望你们帮帮地下的百姓吧。
t_en: As you've all seen, the situation down here is... strained. If you can, we really would appreciate you helping the people.

t_ch: 新发现的巨大矿脉…那儿应该就是冲突的中心吧？
t_en: The giant ore vein — the one they discovered... That must be where the clashes are centered?

t_ch: 走，我们上高处看看。
t_en: Come on, let's get to higher ground and take a look.

t_ch: 呼…呼……
这都能睡着…好厉害的睡功！
t_en: Falling asleep in a place like this... impressive!

t_ch: 喂喂，起床啦！再睡下去，屁股上要长蘑菇啦～
t_en: Hey, wakey-wakey! You'll get mushrooms growing on your head~

t_ch: …嗯…嗯？蘑菇汤，哪有蘑菇汤？希儿小姐？
t_en: Hm...? Wha...? Mushroom bread...? I can't see it on the menu... Miss Seele?

t_ch: 你怎么在这儿睡觉，不要小命了吗？赶紧回休息区避难！
t_en: Have you got a death wish or something? How can you sleep here? Get back to safety and take shelter!

t_ch: 避难…哎哟，我想起来了！有群混混不知道从哪儿冒了出来，跟矿队大打出手……
t_en: Take shelter... *gasp* I remember now! These guys came out of nowhere and got into a fight with the mining team...

t_ch: 我当时困得要死，没跑几步路就被一个家伙擒住了。还好「地火」出手相助，要不然我连这身工作服都要被扒走了！
t_en: At the time I was exhausted — I'd hardly run a few feet when one of them caught me. If it weren't for Wildfire, they'd have stolen the clothes off my back!

t_ch: 后来呢？「地火」去哪了？
t_en: And then? Where did Wildfire go?

t_ch: 应该是往深处去了吧？矿脉那边早就被全副武装的地痞流氓占领了，咱们这些手无寸铁的良民完全不是对手啊！
t_en: Further in, I guess. Those thugs took control of the vein ages ago — and they're fully armed. We poor, defenseless, good folks were no match for them.

t_ch: 要是没有「地火」帮忙，这大矿区怕是要彻底沦落到那些家伙手里喽。
t_en: It's only thanks to Wildfire that the Great Mine hasn't fallen into their hands completely.

t_ch: …这么破的东西他们也要？
t_en: ...They'd take your clothes? These ones?

t_ch: 那伙人，毫无道德底线，抽起风来什么都抢！要不是「地火」，连这大矿区的控制权都要落到他们手上了。
t_en: You don't know these guys — no moral compass — they'd rob you blind in a flash! It's only thanks to Wildfire that the Great Mine hasn't fallen under their control completely.

t_ch: 呃…说起来，「地火」的人呢？是不是往深处去了？那两帮人不会还在干仗吧……
t_en: Uh... speaking of which... where is Wildfire? Did they head further in? Is there a fight happening?

t_ch: …看来奥列格首领应该就在前面。你赶紧去休息区找娜塔吧，别又被流氓缠上。
t_en: ...It seems like Chief Oleg must be up ahead. Hurry up and get back to safety — look for Nat. And try not to get into another scrap along the way.

t_ch: 好嘞，谢谢你们…呃，叫醒我！我还是回去再接着睡吧！
t_en: Okay! Thank you for, um... getting me on my feet! If I get back soon enough, I'll have time for a nap...

t_ch: …欺软怕硬的货色，怎么在史瓦罗的喽啰前头就支棱不起来了啊？你们爹妈没教过什么叫骨气吗？
t_en: ...Cowards and bullies. I don't remember you guys acting this tough around Svarog's minions. Did your parents never teach you what a backbone was?

t_ch: 开玩笑！跟机器人拼命，老子图个啥？你们也别装干净，挖出这么大一片地髓还遮着掩着，独食好吃吗？
t_en: Pff! We ain't stupid! Why would we risk our lives against the robots? And get off the high road — you can't just find a huge chunk of Geomarrow and hog it all to yourselves!

t_ch: 这矿山本就是我们的地盘，矿队没日没夜拼命赶工的时候，也没见你们出半点力气，连个耍嘴皮子放酸屁的都没有！
t_en: This mine is our territory — the mining team is laboring here day in and day out. You guys don't even pretend like you're here to lend a hand!

t_ch: 成天好吃懒做，一门心思只想占别人便宜，居然还这么理直气壮…真不要脸！
t_en: You're lazy. All you want is to profit off of our sweat and tears. And you don't even try hiding it! ...Disgraceful.

t_ch: 肚子都填不饱了，要脸管个屁用——我懂喽，你就盼着咱们全饿趴下，给你们矿队省点口粮喽。
t_en: Where does disgrace come into it when we can't even fill our stomachs, huh!? I know your game — you're just waiting for us to starve to death, so there's more food for your mining team.

t_ch: …跟你们讲道理真是浪费口水。现在好了，你们闹这一出大动静，整片矿脉都被机器人霸占了，谁都落不着好。
t_en: ...It's a waste of time trying to reason with you. While you've been kicking up this fuss, the whole vein's been seized by robots. Now we're all in the same boat.

t_ch: 哼哼，是哦，矿脉是指望不上了…但你可别忘了，上了膛的家伙现在在谁手里呢？
t_en: Hehe, right, right... we can't rely on the vein anymore... But don't forget which side brought loaded guns to the party.

t_ch: 你…你们想干什么？我警告你，「地火」还在附近……
t_en: Whoa, easy, wh—what are you trying to pull off? I—I'm warning you, Wildfire are in the area...

t_ch: 少拿「地火」吓唬咱！他们忙着跟史瓦罗的喽啰玩儿呢，哪有空管你们？不想身上多个窟窿，就把带的物资跟装备都交出来！
t_en: Haha, empty threat! Wildfire are stuck dealing with Svarog's minions — how are they gonna help you now? Unless you're planning on taking a bullet, hand over the supplies and equipment!

t_ch: 他们要动手！对面那群矿工没带武器。
t_en: They're getting ready to attack! Those miners are unarmed.

t_ch: 岂有此理——
t_en: You shameless scoundrels...

t_ch: 快去救人！
t_en: Let's save them!

t_ch: 沉住气——
t_en: Stay calm...

t_ch: 你有耐心，我可没有！他们都是我认识的人！
t_en: You stay calm if you want. I'm taking action! I know those people!

t_ch: 交给我吧。
t_en: Leave it to me.

t_ch: 这时候逞什么个人英雄，我和你一起上！
t_en: No need to play the hero, I'm going with you!

t_ch: 我也要参战，不能让这伙流氓为所欲为！
t_en: I'm going too. We can't let these thugs get away with whatever they like!

t_ch: 希儿！还好你来了，要不然我们就——
t_en: Seele! Thank goodness you came. We were nearly...

t_ch: 几个混混而已，你们没事就好。对了，安东尼娜，你见到奥列格首领了吗？
t_en: Nothing but a few knuckleheads. I'm just glad you're okay. Antonia, have you seen Chief Oleg?

t_ch: 奥列格？他带着一帮人下去里圈了，说是打算把侵入的机器人都给赶走。
t_en: Oleg? He took a group into the inner section. Said it was to clear off the invading robots.

t_ch: 他们去了有一阵子了。哼…要不是「地火」不在，那群混混哪敢这么嚣张。
t_en: They've been gone for a while now. Hmph, if Wildfire was around, those thugs wouldn't have dared.

t_ch: 看来问题的核心还是史瓦罗的机器人……
t_en: Seems like the core of this problem is Svarog's robots...

t_ch: 这群机器人想干什么？
t_en: What do those robots want?

t_ch: 普通机器人是没有自主意志的，它们的目的，其实就是史瓦罗的目的。
t_en: Your run-of-the-mill robots don't have a will of their own. Their aim is merely Svarog's aim.

t_ch: 该聊聊这位「大佬」了。
t_en: We need to talk about this "boss..."

t_ch: 这个「大佬」…他是在银鬃铁卫被调离以后突然出现的，很快就成了下层区的地方一霸。
t_en: The boss... He appeared suddenly after the Guards were redeployed, and became a major player in the Underworld.

t_ch: 史瓦罗自称是人类的守护者，所有无主的机器人都听他的号令。它们占据了炉心枢纽，不允许任何人靠近。
t_en: Svarog claims to be a guardian of humanity — all the ownerless robots obey his commands. They've occupied the furnace core hub, and they're not letting anyone get close.

t_ch: 没人知道史瓦罗为什么要这么干…他平时很少离开炉心，但如果下层区哪里发生了骚乱，他总会掺一脚。
t_en: Nobody knows why Svarog did any of this... He usually doesn't leave the Furnace Core and interfere unless some kind of disorder breaks out in the Underworld.

t_ch: 能号令机器人的…「人类守护者」？我从没听说过这种事……
t_en: ...A "guardian of humanity" that can... command robots? I've never heard of anything like...

t_ch: 哼，你们那什么筑城者，看来也不是全知全能啊。
t_en: Hmph, looks like your mighty Architects weren't as all-knowing as you thought.

t_ch: 你俩每句话都要拌个嘴吗？这都什么时候了，先聊正事吧！矿区里圈这么危险，咱们还进得去吗？
t_en: Can you two say anything without quarreling? This isn't the time! It sounds like there's danger waiting for us in the inner section, can we still get through?

t_ch: 想会会史瓦罗跟他的喽啰。
t_en: I want to meet Svarog and his minions.

t_ch: 对，这事不能就这么算了。首领他们还在下面呢。一堆破铜烂铁机器人而已，咱们可不怕它。
t_en: Right, there's unfinished business here — the chief is still down there. It's only a bunch of scrap metal. What are we afraid of?

t_ch: 矿工都救出来了，回去吧。
t_en: We saved the miners, let's go back.

t_ch: 说得轻巧。事情还没解决，首领他们还在下面呢。一堆破铜烂铁机器人而已，咱们可不怕它。
t_en: Easy for you to say. This isn't over — the chief and the others are still down there. It's only a bunch of scrap metal. What are we afraid of?

t_ch: 还没找到「地火」的人。
t_en: We haven't found Wildfire yet.

t_ch: 对啊，你们不是还要找首领谈事嘛。一堆破铜烂铁机器人而已，咱们可不怕它。
t_en: Yeah, you still need to talk with the chief. It's only a bunch of scrap metal. What are we afraid of?

t_ch: 哦～希儿姑娘开始认可咱的实力啦？
t_en: Ohh~ Is Seele starting to appreciate our strength? Hmm?

t_ch: 实话实说而已，你们身手确实不赖。要是「地火」的人都有你们的功夫，也不至于被史瓦罗压制得死死的了。
t_en: I'll be honest, you guys are hardworking. If everyone from Wildfire were as impressive as you on the battlefield, we wouldn't be so hard-pressed by Svarog.

t_ch: 安东尼娜，你能带着矿队返回入口，与娜塔莎会合吗？
t_en: Antonia, can you take the mining team back through the entrance to meet up with Natasha?

t_ch: 没问题，倒是你们要小心点啊，前面有很多机器人！
t_en: Sure thing, but be careful! There are a lot of robots up ahead!

t_ch: 站在近处看这片矿脉，感觉更加壮观了。
t_en: Seeing it up close... this vein's even more spectacular.

t_ch: 不知道地下能不能撑到它被挖空的那天……
t_en: I doubt the underground will ever see it fully excavated...

t_ch: 这片矿脉…大家就是为了它……
t_en: This vein... So this is what everyone is fighting over...

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生，你看——好大的矿脉呀。克拉拉从来没见过这么多地髓……
t_en: Mr. Svarog, it's such a massive vein. I've never seen so much Geomarrow before...

t_ch: 正在计算——基于平均开采效率，这片矿脉可以维系贝洛伯格两百三十一天，正负误差七天的能量供给。
t_en: Calculating... Based on the average rate of excavation, this vein is enough to supply Belobog with <unbreak>231</unbreak> days of energy, with a margin of error of 7 days.

t_ch: 但你召唤我来，应该不是为了这些矿石。说出你真正的想法吧，克拉拉。
t_en: I sense that your reason for summoning me is not the ore in question. State your true intention, Clara.

t_ch: …对。我是想让史瓦罗先生看到，有很多流浪者和矿工因此受了伤…你能帮帮他们吗？
t_en: ...Right. I wanted Mr. Svarog to see that many miners and vagrants have gotten hurt because of the vein... Can you help them?

t_ch: 我已经阻止了双方阵营的争端，暂时控制了开采区域。评估结果——三十日内，无突发变量，不会发生大规模械斗冲突。
t_en: I have already prevented the dispute and taken temporary control of the excavation zone. Evaluation result: In the event of no further variables, there will be no large-scale armed conflict within the next <unbreak>30</unbreak> days.

t_ch: 我明白史瓦罗先生的用意！只是…克拉拉觉得，只有这样还不够。
t_en: I know why you did it, Mr. Svarog! It's just... I don't think it'll be enough.

t_ch: 矿队、还有「地火」的各位，还是不理解史瓦罗先生的初衷…要是我们能为大家多做些事……
t_en: The mining team and Wildfire... they don't understand your actions... If only we could do more for them...

t_ch: 我的任务是「存护」下层区，少数样本的信任在计算中是多余的。
t_en: My mission is the protection of the Underworld. The trust of the minority sample is redundant to my calculations.

t_ch: 人类的行为永远偏离理性的计算，克拉拉——
t_en: Human behavior will always deviate from rational calculation, Clara...

t_ch: 他们会出现在这里就是证明。
t_en: As evidenced by their presence here.

t_ch: 史瓦罗！上次的账还没跟你算清楚呢。
t_en: Svarog! We haven't settled our final score.

t_ch: 隶属「地火」的希儿…你们的抵抗是无价值的。计算结果非常清晰：留在下层是最优的生存策略。
t_en: Seele, subordinate to Wildfire... Your resistance is futile. The result of my calculation is unequivocal: Remaining in the Underworld is the optimal strategy for survival.

t_ch: 又来了——什么计算结果，生存策略，我可没空听你长篇大论。赶紧把你手下的杂鱼撤走，不然别怪我不客气！
t_en: *sigh* This again... Calculation results, survival strategies... I haven't got time for your thesis. Withdraw your forces, or I'll lose my temper!

t_ch: 你看，克拉拉。即使在极端恶劣的生存条件下，人类也无法避免分裂与争斗。
t_en: Observe, Clara. Even under abject conditions, humans are unable to avoid division and conflict.

t_ch: 但是，史瓦罗先生……
t_en: But, Mr. Svarog...

t_ch: 试图颠覆计算结果的人类，是对下层区生存战略的巨大威胁。计算完成，结论已经明确：用武力使「地火」及其同伙服从是效率最高的方案。
t_en: Human failure to accept the calculation result is a significant threat to the survival strategy of the Underworld. Calculation complete, result unequivocal: Armed suppression of Wildfire and their allies is the optimal course of action.

t_ch: 这位看着就比普通机器人强…
t_en: This guy looks stronger than the other robots...

t_ch: 而且穿着打扮挺有品味…喂，他不会是想撤了吧？那个红衣服的小姑娘怎么办？
t_en: And more fashionably dressed, too... Hey, is he about to leave? What about the girl in red?

t_ch: 他的机器人好像不大友好…
t_en: His robots don't seem too friendly...

t_ch: 啊，那个红衣服的小姑娘怎么办？大机器人要把她带走了！
t_en: Ah! What about the girl in red? That robot is gonna take her away!

t_ch: 我们走，克拉拉。出现外来变量，计算重启，炉心枢纽需要有人守卫。
t_en: We must leave, Clara. External variables have triggered a calculation reset. The Furnace Core hub requires protection.

t_ch: …米尔斯，拜托了，请不要下手太重……
t_en: ...Please, Mills, don't hit them too hard.

t_ch: 嘿，喽啰揍腻了，总算上了道硬菜——我就好好陪你玩玩！
t_en: *sigh* I was getting bored of those minions — time for a real fight. Come at me!

t_ch: 呼…有点本事。史瓦罗手下还有多少这样的大家伙啊？
t_en: Whew... not bad. How many of these big guys is Svarog hiding?

t_ch: 很多——这也是「地火」一直拿他没办法的原因。史瓦罗的势力太强大，靠我们的人手根本撼动不了。
t_en: A lot... which is why Wildfire has never been able to take him down. Svarog's forces are too strong. We don't have enough firepower.

t_ch: 那个红衣服的小姑娘…
t_en: That girl in red...

t_ch: 你说克拉拉？不用在意，那丫头似乎跟史瓦罗关系很好，总是跟在他身后。史瓦罗不会伤害她的。
t_en: Clara? Don't worry about her. That girl is best pals with Svarog — she's always following behind him. He wouldn't harm her.

t_ch: 史瓦罗为什么走了？
t_en: Why did Svarog leave?

t_ch: 我不是说了吗？那家伙很少挪窝，几乎不会离开炉心。就算偶尔离开了，他也不会在外面多待，总是把事丢给手下。
t_en: Like I told you. That guy barely leaves his nest — it's rare to see him away from the Furnace Core. Even when he does appear, he doesn't stick around for long. He leaves everything to his subordinates.

t_ch: 而且，也许因为克拉拉也在吧——就是那个红衣服的丫头。她似乎跟史瓦罗关系很好，总是跟在他身后。
t_en: It might also have been because Clara was here — the little girl in red. She's best pals with Svarog — always following behind him.

t_ch: 我第一次看见的时候也理解不了，现在早就见怪不怪了。赶紧去找首领吧。
t_en: I guess I'm just used to seeing them together now, even if I don't understand it. *sigh* Let's look for the chief.

t_ch: ——不用到处找我啦，希儿。
t_en: No need to look far.

t_ch: 干得不错，希儿。我们被一群不知哪儿来的机器人前后夹攻，本来都以为要打场持久战了，哈哈哈！
t_en: Nice work, Seele. We were attacked on both sides by robots — who knows where they came from. We thought we were in it for the long haul, hahaha!

t_ch: 首领！大家都还好吗，有没有人受伤？
t_en: Chief! Is everyone okay? Is anyone injured?

t_ch: 没事，早习惯了。难缠的机器人杂牌军都被赶回去了，矿区应该能暂且消停一阵。
t_en: We're fine — we're used to it at this point. We sent those pesky robots and ragtag troops packing. The mine should be quiet for a while.

t_ch: 你的这几位同伴是……
t_en: And who are your friends here...

t_ch: 啊，他们啊，是桑博不知从哪带下来的「外来者」，因为有求于「地火」才跟我一起下来的。说来话长，还是留给他们自己解释吧。
t_en: Ahh, them! They're outsiders that Sampo brought down from who-knows-where. They need a favor from Wildfire, so I brought them with me. It'll be faster if they explain.

t_ch: 您就是首领？千呼万唤始出来。
t_en: Are you the chief? You're a hard man to find.

t_ch: 哈哈哈！这家伙，初次见面就这么嚣张，我记住了。
t_en: Hahaha! That's quite the tone to take on our first meeting. I won't forget you in a hurry.

t_ch: 我们想跟「地火」交朋友。
t_en: Pleased to meet you. We're here to make friends with Wildfire.

t_ch: 这话我可是好久没听过了，哈哈，我记住你了。「地火」欢迎真诚的朋友。
t_en: Hah, it's been a while since I heard that anyone was pleased to meet anyone, haha. I won't forget you in a hurry. Wildfire welcomes you.

t_ch: 所以，你们费这么大的力气来这儿找「地火」，是要我们帮什么忙吗？
t_en: So, you went to all this trouble to find Wildfire. What help is it you need?

t_ch: 将此前发生的事和寻找「星核」的诉求全部转述给了奥列格和希儿……
t_en: Telling Oleg and Seele about what happened and your mission to look for the Stellaron...

t_ch: 哈！没想到你们还在上面演了这么一出戏，真是精彩。
t_en: Ha! I didn't know you'd put on a show for the Overworld too. Impressive.

t_ch: 嚯！这还真新鲜，「地火」连地下都快顾不过来了，没想到还有外来者找咱们帮忙。
t_en: Ho-ho, well this is new. Wildfire can barely take care of the Underworld, and now outsiders are looking for assistance from us.

t_ch: 你们说的这个「星核」…我没听过，不知道。但如果是连本地人都没听说过的秘密，我脑袋里倒是有个名字……
t_en: This "Stellaron" you speak of — I've never heard of it. But if it's a secret that even we locals don't know about, then one name does come to mind...

t_ch: …你不会想说可可利亚吧？
t_en: ...Do you mean Cocolia?

t_ch: …你不会想说桑博吧？
t_en: ...Do you mean Sampo?

t_ch: 你哪怕说个大守护者，都比桑博靠谱……
t_en: Really? Sampo? You might as well try the supreme guardian.

t_ch: 现任「大守护者」不过是个骗子，她用花言巧语欺骗了下层区，而且压根不在乎我们的生存——
t_en: The current supreme guardian is a liar who uses sweet words to deceive the Underworld. She's never cared about our survival—

t_ch: 别再说了，我不容许你在我面前侮辱守护者大人。
t_en: Stop right there... I... won't allow you to insult the madam guardian.

t_ch: 上层区的丫头，我说的话听着刺耳，但是句句属实。你可以跟矿镇的人打听打听，看看他们这些年是怎么捱过来的。
t_en: Miss Overworld, my words may be painful to you, but every one of them is true. Go out into the towns and hear for yourself — see how the people here suffer.

t_ch: 下层区对你们的怨气，光靠这两三句话可解释不清，铁卫丫头。但我尊重你的要求，不说了，不说了。
t_en: I haven't gotten close to voicing the extent of the Underworld's grievances, young lady. But I will respect your request. I will leave it at that, for now.

t_ch: 说回正题吧，我刚才想到的「人」，就是史瓦罗。
t_en: Let's get back to the main topic. The name that came to my mind, was Svarog.

t_ch: 欸…欸？！那个史瓦罗，他是你们「地火」的死对头吧？
t_en: Huh...!? Isn't Svarog Wildfire's sworn enemy?

t_ch: 他只是地下的一台机器人，为何会知道重要的秘密？
t_en: Why would a mere robot in the Underworld have knowledge of important secrets?

t_ch: 死对头？我可不这么想。在我看来，他就像这位小哥说的，是台冷冰冰的机器，只认自己「计算」出来的死道理。
t_en: Sworn enemy? Not how I see it. The young master here is closer. Svarog is a cold and unfeeling machine. He recognizes only the dead reasoning of his calculations.

t_ch: 史瓦罗不是在和「地火」作对…或者该说，那家伙根本没把我们放在眼里。他可是经历过「那场战争」的远古机器人……
t_en: Svarog is not against Wildfire... or perhaps I should say: Wildfire isn't even of concern to him. That ancient robot witnessed the war...

t_ch: 如果你们在找的是个有点年头的东西…那没有比他更好的消息源了。
t_en: If you're looking to pick up a thread... he may well be your best source.

t_ch: 有那么老吗？看着还挺新的。
t_en: Is he really that old? He looks pretty new.

t_ch: 你不能以貌取人啊，其实我也有几百岁了，可你看不出来吧？
t_en: Don't judge a book by its cover. I myself have put a few centuries behind me. Would you be able to tell?

t_ch: 我知道二十多个{RUBY_B#「丰饶」的孽物}长生种族{RUBY_E#}，都不长你这样。
t_en: I'm familiar with over twenty {RUBY_B#Abominations of Abundance}long-life species{RUBY_E#} — none of them look like you.

t_ch: 可恶，你就不能捧个场吗！
t_en: Hey! Would it kill you to play along?

t_ch: 是指和反物质军团的战争吧。
t_en: You mean the war with the Antimatter Legion?

t_ch: 嗯，记得这个世界在好几百年前，遭到过军团的入侵。
t_en: Yeah, I remember hearing this world was invaded by the Legion hundreds of years ago.

t_ch: 机器人不会遗忘。如果连史瓦罗都不知道「星核」是什么，那我真的爱莫能助了。
t_en: Robots don't forget. If Svarog hasn't heard of your Stellaron, then I'm afraid perhaps no one has.

t_ch: 所以，我们得想办法让史瓦罗愿意和我们沟通。
t_en: In which case, we need to think of a way to convince Svarog to communicate with us.

t_ch: 或者交出他的记忆库，我们自己找也行。
t_en: Or get him to hand over his memory bank. We could go through it ourselves.

t_ch: 该怎么做……
t_en: What should we do...

t_ch: 我们一直想跟那家伙谈判，但每次都被拒之门外。他认定「地火」是个威胁。不过，如果是你们几个的话……
t_en: We've tried repeatedly to negotiate with Svarog, but he rejects every effort. He believes that Wildfire is a threat. Still, if it were you guys...

t_ch: 嗯…可不好说。
t_en: Hmm... It's difficult to say.

t_ch: ——具体办法，等明天再讨论也不迟。时候不早了，你们也折腾坏了吧？回镇上休息吧，一切我来安排。
t_en: ...We have time. Let's get into the detail tomorrow. It's late, and you must've been through a lot. Go back to the town and rest. I'll make arrangements.

t_ch: 又安排休息？我对这个世界的休息都有心理阴影了……
t_en: Again? I'm starting to get nervous of "arranged rest" on this planet...

t_ch: 至于你…铁卫丫头，有空吗？我想单独跟你聊聊。
t_en: As for our Silvermane girl here... do you have time? I'd like to talk with you in private.

t_ch: …说好了喔，捉迷藏赢了就把秘密一五一十告诉姐姐。
t_en: ...So you promise that if I win hide-and-seek, you'll tell big sister March all the ins and outs.

t_ch: 一五一十！…是什么意思？
t_en: Yep! All the ins and outs, hehe! ...What does that mean?

t_ch: 就是全部说出来，不能隐瞒，也不能骗姐姐。
t_en: It just means you'll tell me all the details. No hiding anything, and no telling fibs.

t_ch: 哼，虎克又不是地上人，才不会说谎呢！
t_en: Hmph, Hook isn't an overgrounder y'know! Hook never tells fibs!

t_ch: 才不会说谎！
t_en: Yeah, never!

t_ch: 一言为定～那我们来玩吧……咦？
t_en: Well, that's settled then~ Okay, let's play... Huh?

t_ch: 你…什么时候来的？
t_en: You... When did you get here?

t_ch: 来很久了。
t_en: I've been here a while.

t_ch: 呃，不是咱想玩捉迷藏啊，你听我解释……
t_en: Uh... th—this isn't just hide-and-seek, okay? Let me explain...

t_ch: 你挺有雅兴啊？
t_en: Does it matter?

t_ch: 呃，不是咱想玩捉迷藏啊，你听我解释……
t_en: Uh... th—this isn't just hide-and-seek, okay? Let me explain...

t_ch: 没多久，姐姐。
t_en: Not that long... big sister.

t_ch: 不要学小孩子说话的语气！
t_en: Quit acting like a child!

t_ch: 是这样的：我醒来以后，医生说丹恒被那个坏蛋桑博带走了。我绕了一圈都没找着，恰好遇到这几个孩子说知道他的下落。
t_en: It's like this: After I woke up, that doctor said Sampo had taken Dan Heng with him. I went around in circles trying to find the blue-haired scoundrel, and bumped into these kids. They say they know where he is!

t_ch: 但他们说，想知道就得加入什么「鼹鼠党」，要加入鼹鼠党，就得一起玩游戏，赢了才能证明我的实力…这样你明白了吧？
t_en: But they said I had to join "The Moles" or something if I wanted to find out... and to do that, I had to prove my strength by winning a game of hide-and-seek... do you get it?

t_ch: 明白了，我陪你吧。
t_en: I get it. Need a teammate?

t_ch: 什么！？{NICKNAME}，你居然这么体贴！
t_en: Huh. {NICKNAME}, when did you start being so nice?

t_ch: 明白了，你加油啊。
t_en: I get it. Well, best of luck.

t_ch: 来都来了，你还想走？{NICKNAME}，陪我一起玩捉迷藏！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you just got here and now you're gonna leave? Play hide-and-seek with me!

t_ch: 明白了，你搞不定这些孩子。
t_en: I get it. You're being bullied by children.

t_ch: …虽然很火大但确实没法反驳——{NICKNAME}，要不你来帮我吧！
t_en: ...Ugh, so what if I am! {NICKNAME}, why don't you help me, huh!?

t_ch: 喂，你们还要说悄悄话到什么时候啊！鼹鼠党的时间可是很宝贵的！
t_en: Hey, are you done with your secret talk!? The Moles' time is precious!

t_ch: 很宝贵的！
t_en: Yeah, precious!

t_ch: 这就开始这就开始，对了，这位{NICKNAME}也想加入鼹鼠党，可以一起玩吗？漆黑的虎克大人？
t_en: Okay, okay, we're done. Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, this is my friend, {NICKNAME}. {F#She}{M#He} also wants to join The Moles. Can {F#she}{M#he} play too?

t_ch: 呣呣呣呣…行吧？好像也没啥不妥，你们就一起负责捉人吧！
t_en: Ummmm... sure. I guess so. Then... you guys are seeking!

t_ch: 老大！我看他们不太聪明的样子，要不要先演示一下？
t_en: ...Boss! They don't seem very smart. Why don't we do a practice one first?

t_ch: 唔…尤利安说得对，那就先演练一遍吧？我先去藏好，你们两个来找我！
t_en: Hmm... you're right Julian. Okay, let's do a practice one. I'll hide, you two have to find me!

t_ch: 居然被小孩子看不起了…可恶，你们给我等着！
t_en: So you kids think you're better than us, huh? Just you wait and see!

t_ch: 嘿，抓住你了！
t_en: Ha! Gotcha!

t_ch: 哼，这不过是演练而已！正式开始以后，我们可不会让着你们了哟！
t_en: S—So what, it's just a practice! Wait until we're playing for real — you'll see!

t_ch: 哼哼，放马过来吧！
t_en: Hehe, bring it on!

t_ch: 那现在就开始咯！数到五十再睁眼，大姐姐你可不许耍赖！
t_en: Alright, now we're playing for real! You gotta count to fifty before you open your eyes — no cheating!

t_ch: 四十七…四十八…四十九…五十！
t_en: <unbreak>47</unbreak>... <unbreak>48</unbreak>... <unbreak>49</unbreak>... <unbreak>50</unbreak>!

t_ch: 哼哼～准备好了吗？藏好尾巴，姐姐要来抓坏孩子咯……
t_en: Hehe~ Ready or not, here I come, naughty children...

t_ch: 鼹鼠党的连胜记录，才不会轻易被打破！
t_en: The Moles haven't lost a game for ages! You're doomed!

t_ch: 就让你们见识下，地底最强的捉迷藏小分队吧！
t_en: You got it yet? We're the underground's greatest hiders and seekers!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，规则很简单，看到躲起来的孩子，捉住他就行啦！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, it's simple. When you see one of them, you just have to catch them!

t_ch: 哈哈，抓到你啦！
t_en: Haha, I caught you!

t_ch: 要想真正地抓住我，你还必须正确回答我一个问题。
t_en: Hmph, doesn't count unless you can answer this question.

t_ch: 可以，你问吧！
t_en: Okay, let's hear it.

t_ch: 还有这个规则？
t_en: Show me the rule book.

t_ch: 什么啊，抓住了就是抓住了，你还真的想答题啊？
t_en: Wha—! But we caught you! What's with the Q&A?

t_ch: …咕，我还以为你肯定会上当。
t_en: ...*sigh* I thought I had you there.

t_ch: 别跑！抓到你啦，虎克！
t_en: Don't run! I got you, Hook!

t_ch: 可、可恶啊！我作为鼹鼠党的老大，居然栽在你们这些坏蛋手里了！
t_en: N—Not fair! I'm the boss of The Moles — how can I lose to a bunch of villains!

t_ch: 要打要罚，随你们处置吧！
t_en: Do your worst! I'm not afraid.

t_ch: 你的戏怎么这么多……
t_en: What are they feeding you kids down here...

t_ch: 哼，虽然我落到你们手里了，但是你们肯定抓不住我的得力副手尤利安！
t_en: Hmph. You might have found me, but there's no way you can find my trusty deputy, Julian!

t_ch: 他的外号可是「千面尤利安」，是个伪装高手！就算只是个小孩子，也可以打扮成……
t_en: He's known as "Julian of a Thousand Faces" — a master of disguise! That kid can even make himself look like...

t_ch: 啊，糟糕，说漏嘴了…反正你们快去找吧！
t_en: Argh, darn! I've said too much... Anyway, just try and see if you can find him, heh!

t_ch: 「千面尤利安」，伪装高手……
t_en: Julian of a Thousand Faces, master of disguise...

t_ch: 唔…虽然没太弄明白，但还是先记下这个线索吧。
t_en: Hmm... I don't really know what it means, but we should take note of it anyway...

s_ch: 至少看上去是成年男性

t_ch: 敏锐的直觉告诉我这个人不大对劲，但是……
t_en: My instincts are telling me something's not right with this guy, but...

t_ch: 不用怀疑，就是他。
t_en: It's him, no doubt.

s_ch: 至少看上去是成年男性
t_ch: 胡说！你见过这么老的8岁小孩吗？
t_en: Nonsense! Ahem! How many eight-year-olds do you see walking around that look like this, huh?

t_ch: 他高了，也变老了。
t_en: He's looking taller... and older.

s_ch: 至少看上去是成年男性
t_ch: 没错！任谁来看，我都是个成熟的大人。
t_en: That's because I'm tall... and old! I'm a grown man! Ask anyone!

t_ch: 外表看似大人…
t_en: Looks like an adult to me...

t_ch: 智慧却如同小孩……
t_en: ...With a child's brain...?

s_ch: 至少看上去是成年男性
t_ch: 真相只有一个：我就是个成熟的大人！
t_en: Well here's the truth: I'm a grown man!

t_ch: 别伪装啦，声音已经把你暴露了……
t_en: Alright, the jig is up, your voice gave it away...

t_ch: …可恶，要是没搭话就好了！我「千面尤利安」浪得虚名，愧对老大！
t_en: ...Argh! But I'm Julian of a Thousand Faces! *sigh* Why did you have to talk to me! My reputation is ruined... What will the boss think!

t_ch: 倒也不必，你的伪装术已经可以说是魔法了……
t_en: No need for the melodrama. That was still a magical performance...

t_ch: 唔…总觉得有哪里不对……
t_en: Hmm... something's not right...

t_ch: 那边的家伙，好像一直在偷瞄我们？虽然还在跟虎克他们玩游戏…但还是上去确认一下吧？
t_en: That guy's been staring at us this whole time... Hide-and-seek might have to wait — let's see what he wants.

t_ch: 对、对不起，虎克老大！我失败了……
t_en: I... *sigh* I'm sorry boss! I failed...

t_ch: 可恶！居然能识破尤利安的伪装，你们到底是何方神圣！
t_en: Darn! How did you see through Julian's disguise? What villainy is this?

t_ch: 嘻嘻，明察秋毫，心细如发——说的就是本姑娘我啦！
t_en: Hehehe... "Those with keen eyes see the dust between the stars!" I came up with that, by the way.

t_ch: 还有我！
t_en: With my help!

t_ch: 是是是，咱俩是最佳拍档～
t_en: Yeah, yeah, you're in the footnote somewhere~

t_ch: 没错，说的就是你！
t_en: You sure did!

t_ch: 谢谢你的夸奖！
t_en: About time I got some credit for it!

t_ch: 你居然懂成语…
t_en: Doesn't sound like something you'd say...

t_ch: 你当我是文盲嘛！
t_en: Hey! I read books y'know!

t_ch: 怎么样，漆黑的虎克大人，现在可以把秘密告诉我们了吧？
t_en: So, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, you can tell us now, right?

t_ch: 呣呣呣…鼹鼠党的老大，说到就要做到！
t_en: Ummmm... Yes. The boss of The Moles is true to her word!

t_ch: 虎克看到黑色头发的大哥哥，被蓝色头发的叔叔带去搏击俱乐部了。
t_en: Hook saw the blue-haired guy take your dark-haired friend to the Fight Club.

t_ch: 搏击俱乐部？
t_en: The Fight Club?

t_ch: 第一条规则是…
t_en: I thought the first rule was...

t_ch: 不可提及搏击俱乐部……
t_en: ...You don't talk about it...

t_ch: 你们在说什么悄悄话呀？
t_en: Is this more secret talk?

t_ch: 不好，要出事！
t_en: That doesn't sound good!

t_ch: 是啊，带丹恒去那种地方，桑博估计要出事了。
t_en: No kidding, they didn't exactly get off on the right foot.

t_ch: 啊，漆黑的虎克大人，搏击俱乐部在哪，能帮忙带个路吗？
t_en: Uh, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, where is the Fight Club? Can you show us the way?

t_ch: 呣呣呣～那么显眼的一栋房子都找不到嘛？大人真不靠谱！
t_en: Hmm~ But it's an obvious building, grown-ups are just useless~

t_ch: 跟虎克来吧，我带你们过去。
t_en: Come with Hook, I'll take you over.

t_ch: 谢啦，虎克大人。
t_en: Thanks, o great one.

t_ch: 不许这么敷衍地叫我！要尊敬地叫我漆黑的虎克大人！
t_en: That's Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, to you! Who said you could shorten my title!?

t_ch: 呃…嗨！原来是你们啊，我说怎么有几个人跟在后面，寻思是不是遇见劫道的了，忍不住越走越快…早知道是你们，我就张开双臂来相见了呀。
t_en: H—Hey! It's you! I was just thinking to myself: "Am I getting robbed? Who are these people following me?" So, y'know, you start to walk a little faster, and... Anyhoo if I'd just turned around, I could've thrown open my arms and said a big "hi" to my old friends.

t_ch: 少来这套，你明明是看见我们心虚才跑的。
t_en: Save it. You saw us in there and got scared, so you pulled a runner.

t_ch: 我？我哪有心虚，哈哈哈，我桑博一向问心无愧…天哪，难道我无意中做了什么得罪各位好朋友的事吗！
t_en: Me? Scared? Hahaha, my friends, what do I have to fear? *gasp* Surely I haven't done anything to offend you?

t_ch: 你把我们丢给铁卫。
t_en: You threw us to the Silvermane Guards.

t_ch: 反过来想想，要是我没跑，杰帕德把咱们一锅端后还会给你们说话的机会吗？早就直接扔大牢了。
t_en: Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa rewind. If I hadn't made a break for it, Gepard would've caught all of us. And do you think he would've given you a chance to explain yourselves? Hmm? He would've checked you straight into the graybar hotel!

t_ch: 我可是一直暗中看护你们啊！你晓得铁卫盯了你们多久吗，我好容易才找到一个救人的机会……
t_en: Meanwhile, there I was, looking out for you from the shadows! Do you know how difficult it was to make an entrance? They were watching you the whole time!

t_ch: 你把丹恒骗去打拳。
t_en: You set Dan Heng up.

t_ch: 怎么能叫骗呢，我是看大伙初来乍到的，身上又没有地下的货币，多少有点窘迫，专门给你们介绍工作啊！
t_en: Set him up? Yeah, with a job! You guys are new here, and let me tell you — you're gonna need some cash.

t_ch: 我桑博既然认了各位做朋友，就要帮人帮到底，不仅要把你们救下来，还要替你们的未来着想，全方位地安排妥当。这就是友情啊！但……
t_en: And, Sampo Koski stops at nothing to help his friends. Saving you was just the beginning — I have to consider your finances too! With me you get the full service, folks. That's friendship.

t_ch: 没有，就是吓唬你。
t_en: Nah, we're just messing with you.

t_ch: …好家伙，下次别这样了，我可是吓得不轻。
t_en: ...My fine fellow, please don't do that again. You scared the daylights outta me.

t_ch: 不不不，我可是来真的！你把我们弄到地下来，到底有什么企图！
t_en: Wait a minute, we're not done here! You dragged us to the underground — so what's the big idea?

t_ch: 把你们弄到这儿…真的是迫不得已。留在地上太危险了，咱们都是铁卫悬赏捉拿的要犯；地下纵有千般不好，至少铁卫绝对不会追下来，是个安全的去处……
t_en: I had no choice but to take you guys down here. It was too dangerous for us on the surface — we're wanted criminals!? Sure, the Underworld has its drawbacks, but at least the Guards would never follow us. We're safe here...

t_ch: 即使如此，也没有迷晕我们的必要吧？
t_en: Be that as it may, did you really have to poison us?

t_ch: 当时局势那么危急，哪有琢磨的时间，手头有什么就扔什么咯。
t_en: Maybe you've forgotten, but we were in a tight spot my friend — there was no time to think. I had to use whatever I could.

t_ch: 不是为了隐藏什么吗？某个不想让任何人，比如我们，知道的秘密？
t_en: Hmm.. So it wasn't to cover anything up? A secret that you didn't want anyone, including us, to find out?

t_ch: 丹恒，是什么秘密啊？
t_en: Dan Heng, what secret?

t_ch: 还不清楚具体内容…但我知道你背后有鬼。
t_en: I'm not certain yet... but there's more to our "friend" here than meets the eye.

t_ch: 好了！我会帮助你们，毫不保留，分文不收！只求小哥千万别到处乱说！
t_en: You win! I'll help you to the best of my ability — free of charge I might add! But please, don't go spreading rumors about me?

t_ch: 为表诚意，我先引荐各位认识「地火」。如果你们想在地下找什么，问他们就对了！
t_en: *sigh* Alright! To prove my sincerity, I'll introduce you to Wildfire. If you're looking for something down here, they're the ones to ask!

t_ch: 我们为什么要认识「地火」？
t_en: Why should we get to know Wildfire?

t_ch: 因为你们有需求啊，这还用问？丹恒小哥说你们在找什么「星核」——这种听着就很厉害的玩意，也就「地火」那儿可能有线索了。
t_en: Because you are looking for something! Why are you asking? Dan Heng told me you guys were searching for a... what's the word... "Stellaron" — sounded pretty powerful. If anyone has a clue on its whereabouts, it'll be Wildfire.

t_ch: 你不是说在搏击俱乐部拿到冠军，才能得到线索吗？
t_en: You said I'd uncover a clue if I became the Fight Club champion.

t_ch: 呃…呃，对、对啊。你拿到冠军就有名气了，出名了「地火」就愿意见你了，没毛病啊。
t_en: Uhh... Uh, y—yeah! I mean, If you'd fought in the final round and won, you'd have incredible street cred right now! Wildfire wouldn't think twice about talking with you. I don't see the problem.

t_ch: 「地火」凭什么要帮我们？
t_en: Why would Wildfire want to help us?

t_ch: 那当然没有白吃的午餐，「地火」现在没理由帮你们，想办法找个理由不就结了？就几位的身手，还愁没有筹码么？
t_en: Well, there's no such thing as a free lunch, of course. Wildfire has no reason to help you yet, so we'll just have to give them one! With your talents, we have nothing to worry about.

t_ch: 我跟你说，天底下什么事情都一个道理：找到需求，啥都好办。地下被封锁了十几年，总有一伙人不愿意坐以待毙吧？
t_en: I'm telling you, no matter where you go, there's only one rule to getting things done: Find the demand. Y'know, like supply and demand? Anyway, The underground has been sealed off for more than a decade — but do you think people here are just resigned to their fate?

t_ch: 「地火」到底是什么组织。
t_en: What kind of organization is Wildfire?

t_ch: 你问我呢，那就是一群笨蛋、直肠子、一根筋。不过谁在乎我怎么想呢……
t_en: Well if you want my opinion, they're a bunch of artless, stubborn fools. But who cares what I think, huh?

t_ch: 他们是一群为了维持地下秩序自发组织起来的实干派。铁卫撤出地底后，这地下的秩序就都靠「地火」维持了。
t_en: They're a band of do-gooders who sprung up to maintain order in the underground. After the Silvermane Guards withdrew, Wildfire set up shop.

t_ch: 可别小看这帮家伙啊！「高手在民间」，听过这句话吧？「地火」可是高手云集，你们见了就知道了。
t_en: Still, don't underestimate them! "We walk in the presence of giants" — have you heard that saying before? Well, Wildfire has giants in its midst. You'll see.

t_ch: 带路吧…这回别坑我们。
t_en: Lead the way... and don't try and pull anything this time.

t_ch: 放一万个心吧！还是那句话，桑博绝对不让帮过咱的伙计吃亏。
t_en: Have a little faith! It's like I said: "Sampo never lets friends who've helped him come to harm." Hehe...

t_ch: 前面那个人…是在睡觉吗？
t_en: That person up ahead... is he asleep?

t_ch: 上去看看，说不定他需要帮忙。
t_en: Let's head up and take a look, he might need help.

t_ch: 我认得那边的姑娘，是第一矿队的伊蕾恩！快，快上去看看她伤势如何。
t_en: I recognize that woman — that's Elaine from First Mining Team! Quick, let's get up there and see if she's wounded.

t_ch: 伊蕾恩！你还好吗，伤势严重吗？
t_en: Elaine! Are you okay? Are you hurt?

t_ch: 希儿！谢谢，我还好，只是关节有两处扭伤。
t_en: Seele! Thank goodness. I—I'm fine, just a couple of sprains.

t_ch: 你们来得正是时候，那些流浪者一直在问机器人的事，可我真的什么也不知道……
t_en: You've got good timing — those vagrants were asking me about the robots, but I don't know anything...

t_ch: 机器人？
t_en: Robots?

t_ch: 我们也不知道…
t_en: Doesn't ring a bell...

t_ch: 啊，你们还不清楚里面的情况吧？大矿区里圈已经被一群机器人占领了！矿队还是流浪者都没法靠近。
t_en: Oh! Don't you know? The inner section of the Great Mine has been seized by a band of robots! Neither the mining team nor the vagrants can get anywhere near.

t_ch: …第三方势力「机器人」出现啦！我就说嘛，要真是人和人斗，这故事就没意思了。
t_en: New challengers enter! About time, human-only conflicts are so boring.

t_ch: 没人知道机器人的来历吗？
t_en: Does anyone know where the robots come from?

t_ch: 我们一开始以为是采掘机出了集体故障，后来却发现那些机器根本就不是矿队的资产。
t_en: At first, we thought that a collective fault had occurred in the excavation machines, but then we found out that those machines didn't even belong to the mining team.

t_ch: 它们不知从哪儿涌了出来，一股脑就把我们和流浪者全赶出去了，还堵住了下到里圈的必经矿道。
t_en: They came out of nowhere and pushed the vagrants and us back. Then they blocked off the only tunnels into the inner section.

t_ch: 难道有人在背后捣鬼？
t_en: Maybe someone's playing tricks?

t_ch: 肯定不是矿队的人…单是操作一台矿机就够累的了。同时操控这么多？不可能的。
t_en: Hehe, there's no way anyone in the mining team is behind this... Operating a single unit is tiring enough, but a whole group? Hehe, Impossible.

t_ch: 那只有一个答案了：「史瓦罗大佬」……
t_en: Then there's only one possibility... Boss Svarog.

t_ch: 史瓦罗？这名字听着耳熟……
t_en: Svarog? That name sounds familiar...

t_ch: 记得在拳馆击败的机器人吗？
t_en: You remember the robots we defeated in the boxing gym?

t_ch: 啊，对哦，「史瓦罗大佬的机器人」！这个史瓦罗是什么来头？
t_en: Oh! Boss Svarog's robots! What's his deal?

t_ch: 说来话长，反正不好惹。咱们还是赶紧去找其他人吧——伊蕾恩，你能自己走回休息区吗？
t_en: Let's just say he's not to be trifled with. Let's go and find some other people. Elaine, can you make it back to safety?

t_ch: 我没问题的，希儿和各位也一定要小心……
t_en: No problem. Seele, and the rest of you — be careful...

t_ch: 这升降机，是坏、坏了吗？怎么一点反、反应都没有啊？
t_en: Is this elevator b—broken? Why isn't it r—responding?

t_ch: 你老惦记着这破玩意干嘛，还想下去当机器人的活靶子啊？
t_en: Why are you worried about this piece of junk? Do you really wanna go down there and be a live target for the robots?

t_ch: 可、可是，要是就这么撤、撤了，咱们岂不是什么好处都没捞到？
t_en: But, i—if we evacuate, then haven't we lost out?

t_ch: 笨不笨，去抢矿工啊！我亲眼看见的，他们已经把一些地髓装袋了，正是下手的好机会。
t_en: You idiot — we'll just steal off the miners! Look, I saw with my own eyes — they managed to bag some Geomarrow. This is a perfect opportunity.

t_ch: 好、好主意！
t_en: Oh, g—good idea!

t_ch: 真不要脸，居然还在打矿队的主意…看我来收拾你们！
t_en: Shameless. Still after the miners, are you? Time to teach you a lesson.

t_ch: 哎，那边怎么闹哄哄的，好像有好多人在吵架……
t_en: Hey, what's that commotion? It sounds like there's a big argument happening...

t_ch: 靠近点看看情况吧？
t_en: Let's get closer and take a look.

t_ch: 停！停停停！哇…那边有个凶神恶煞的大家伙！
t_en: Whoa! Stop! Ah! Stop, stop, stop! There's a big evil hunk of metal right there!

t_ch: 那种型号…是史瓦罗的狗腿子没错了。
t_en: That model... it's one of Svarog's lapdogs alright.

t_ch: 不用怕，我有对付它的经验。我们上吧！
t_en: Don't be afraid, I've dealt with those robots before. Let's go!

t_ch: 哦，{NICKNAME}，想听听咱的地下见闻吗？
t_en: Oh, hi {NICKNAME}, wanna listen to my thoughts on the underground?

t_ch: 想听。
t_en: Sure.

t_ch: 现在就算了吧。
t_en: Not right now.

t_ch: 那好吧，咱还以为你很感兴趣呢。
t_en: No worries, just thought you might be interested.

t_ch: 从哪里开始说起呢？
t_en: Where should I start?

t_ch: 想听听你对下层区的观察…
t_en: I want to hear about your observations....

t_ch: 哈，你大可相信我的观察力。
t_en: Ha, my observational skills are second to none.

t_ch: 下层区的地理？
t_en: How about the Underworld geography?

t_ch: 下层区四处都是岩壁，没有明显的区域规划，只有分散的矿区和小镇，就像是贝洛伯格的郊区。
t_en: Well, the Underworld is surrounded by cliffs, and there's no obvious structure. It seems like a spread out collection of mines and small towns — just like the outskirts of Belobog.

t_ch: 哪里都能望见的那根巨大柱子被称为「炉心」，也许那里是什么能源中心吧？
t_en: There's that huge pillar called the Furnace Core that's always in view — maybe it's some kind of energy hub?

t_ch: 下层区的生活？
t_en: How about Underworld life?

t_ch: 根据咱的观察，小镇上的住民基本都是从事体力劳动的矿民，不像上层区那么富裕。
t_en: From what I've seen, the residents are nearly all miners. It seems like the people here have less than those in the Overworld.

t_ch: 不过，矿民们休息的时候还会来看拳赛，这可比上层区的歌剧院要接地气不少吧。
t_en: Still, the miners watch fights in their spare time. It's less pretentious than that theater they have on the surface.

t_ch: 下层区的人？
t_en: How about the Underworlders?

t_ch: 下层区的人好像都很匆忙，这里生活节奏太快啦。跟这里比起来，熙熙攘攘的上层区都显得舒适了不少。
t_en: They're always in a hurry. The pace of life here is so fast! Things are pretty busy in the Overworld too, but everything feels more relaxed up there.

t_ch: 我想问的差不多了。
t_en: That's all I can think of.

t_ch: 想听听你对其他人的看法…
t_en: I want to hear what you think about the others...

t_ch: 人情世故嘛，我不是很擅长，不过你问。
t_en: I'm not so good at analyzing people, but seeing as you asked...

t_ch: 桑博？
t_en: Sampo?

t_ch: 这个人奸懒谗猾，我不喜欢！看见他就讨厌。
t_en: That guy!? He's lazy, lying, cunning, and evil! I don't like him — can't stand the sight of him.

t_ch: 你是不是觉得这个人还挺有意思的？当心别被他骗啦。
t_en: I bet you think he's pretty entertaining. Watch out, or he'll fool you!

t_ch: 虎克？
t_en: Hook?

t_ch: 啊，你是说一起捉迷藏的那个孩子王吗？
t_en: Ah, you mean that naughty kid we played hide-and-seek with?

t_ch: 娜塔莎医生说，虎克虽然吵吵闹闹的，但一直在照顾那些无家可归的小孩子，说不定是个心思细腻的小大人呢。
t_en: Dr. Natasha said that she's a handful, but that she also takes care of the homeless kids. Maybe she's more mature than she seems?

t_ch: …不过这熊孩子的态度还是太嚣张了，说几句话就让我莫名地火大。
t_en: ...Still, I can't believe how arrogant she is. I was pretty mad with her for a while.

t_ch: 布洛妮娅？
t_en: Bronya?

t_ch: 军官大小姐吗？看着人不错的样子，长得也好看。
t_en: The Silvermane girl? She's pretty. I like looking at her.

t_ch: 刚见面时觉得挺嚣张，现在一副心事重重的样子，咱也不好问。
t_en: When I first met her I thought she was kinda scary, but now it seems like there's something on her mind. I'm too nervous to ask her.

t_ch: 不过，她现在不打算逮捕我们了，这就挺好的呀。
t_en: At least she's not trying to arrest us anymore.

t_ch: 希儿？
t_en: Seele?

t_ch: 这姑娘性子直，能处。你听见她痛骂银鬃铁卫了吗？哈哈，真解气，我觉得跟她能聊得来。
t_en: She says what she thinks — I like her. And did you hear what she said about the Silvermane Guards? Haha, sounded like she'd been waiting a long time to say it. I think I'd get along with her.

t_ch: 要是能得到她的帮助，寻找星核也会方便不少吧。
t_en: If we can get her to help us, we'll bag a Stellaron in no time!

t_ch: 我想问的差不多了。
t_en: That's all I can think of.

t_ch: 就聊到这里吧。
t_en: That's it for now.

t_ch: 你要是听到什么有趣的八…消息，随时来告诉我噢。
t_en: If you hear any juicy gossi— uh... information, come find me!

t_ch: 无聊了？来，桑博哥哥陪你聊天。
t_en: Bored? Your big brother Sampo's always up for a chat.

t_ch: 你到底是什么人？
t_en: Who the heck are you?

t_ch: 这是什么问题，咱们一起出生入死，我是你的好兄弟桑博•科斯基啊！
t_en: What kind of question is that!? I'm your old pal — Sampo Koski — we've been through thick and thin together!

t_ch: 你没回答我的问题。
t_en: You didn't answer the question.

t_ch: 那说明问题不对。提问就像做买卖，需求够清楚，才能买到正确的东西嘛。
t_en: Well, that just means there's something wrong with your question! Questions are like transactions — if your request isn't clear, you might end up buying the wrong thing.

t_ch: 谁跟你出生入死。
t_en: We haven't been through thick OR thin... pal.

t_ch: 我们一起风中来雪里去！并肩迎战杰帕德•朗道！我不顾生命危险闯入裂界，从布洛妮娅•兰德的魔爪下救了你们！
t_en: What do you mean!? We battled wind and snow — fought shoulder to shoulder against the great Gepard Landau! I risked life and limb in the Fragmentum to save you from the evil clutches of the fearsome Bronya Rand!

t_ch: 这还不算出生入死吗？
t_en: How's that for thick and thin?

t_ch: 兄弟！
t_en: My old pal!

t_ch: 兄弟！哈哈，感觉怪怪的。
t_en: Yeah! Haha... Wait, do you mean it?

t_ch: 「地火」和希儿是谁？
t_en: Who are Wildfire and Seele?

t_ch: 「地火」是我的大客户，虽然尽是些麻烦的差事…不过合作还是很愉快的！哈哈，钱到位就是好甲方，别的不能奢求。
t_en: Wildfire are one of my major clients, though the work is mostly odds and ends... Still! It's always a pleasure. Haha, who am I to complain if the money's right, huh?

t_ch: 希儿是「地火」的干部，是奥列格头儿信任的骨干。大概在她看来，我就是「地火」差使的一条狗吧。
t_en: Seele works for them — Oleg's most trusted lieutenant. *sigh* To her I'm probably just, uh, Wildfire's lapdog.

t_ch: 当狗也挺好的。
t_en: Haha! But a very contented lapdog, I should add! Hehe...

t_ch: 「地火」想做什么？
t_en: What do Wildfire want?

t_ch: 不知道啊，我又不是「地火」成员，他们也不会把目的都告诉我。再说了，我这个人嘴很严的……
t_en: As a non-member, not a clue. They'd never tell me their ultimate aims. Shame, really, it's not like I'm a blabbermouth...

t_ch: 就先聊到这儿吧。
t_en: Good to chat.

t_ch: 好啊，有空再聊。
t_en: A pleasure! Until next time.

t_ch: …我奉大守护者的谕令，要将你们捉拿逮捕，这点还没有变。
t_en: ...I will arrest you under the supreme guardian's decree. Nothing has changed.

t_ch: 我不是你们的朋友……
t_en: I am not your friend...

t_ch: 朋友都是培养出来的。
t_en: It takes time to make friends.

t_ch: 我就喜欢接近敌人。
t_en: I like to get close to my enemies.

t_ch: 请逮捕我吧！
t_en: Please arrest me! I can't wait!

t_ch: 你这个人，多少有点问题……
t_en: ...There's... something wrong with you.

t_ch: …歌德宾馆的前一天，我见过你们。杰帕德带你们去拜见母…大守护者，他告诉我，你们是从天外到来的客人。
t_en: ...I saw you the day before the Goethe Hotel. Gepard took you to see mo— ...the supreme guardian. He told me you were visitors from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 就像古老传说中，那些身携星神的意志，各色各样的星际旅行者。
t_en: Just like the interstellar travelers of ancient legend — people of all kinds that carried the will of the Aeons.

t_ch: 杰帕德说，你们想要帮助我们，停止寒潮和裂界对这颗星球的伤害…但是当天晚上，母亲就召见我，命令我带兵捉拿你们。
t_en: Gepard said that you wanted to help us reverse the damage that the Eternal Freeze and Fragmentum continue to wreak on our planet... but that night, mother summoned me, and ordered me to take a detachment to arrest you.

t_ch: 到底发生了什么？大守护者没有告诉我详情，杰帕德也赶赴前线，我不明白……
t_en: What happened? The supreme guardian didn't tell me the details and Gepard had to rush back to the front line... I don't understand...

t_ch: 我也不知道。
t_en: You're not the only one...

t_ch: 我们真的想帮助你们。
t_en: We really do want to help you.

t_ch: 大守护者背叛了我们。
t_en: The supreme guardian betrayed us.

t_ch: 银鬃铁卫已经奉命全部撤回地上了，在这里，我不能以铁卫的身份行动。
t_en: The Silvermane Guards withdrew to the surface long ago... I must avoid that identity here.

t_ch: 在返回地上以前，我们暂时休战，联手合作吧。我也想知道你们的真正用意……
t_en: Until we're back in the Overworld, I propose a temporary truce and cooperation. Your true intentions are of interest to me...

t_ch: 为了让你相信我，我会尽量回答你的问题。
t_en: If it helps you to trust me, I'm willing to answer your questions to the best of my ability.

t_ch: 我们犯的是什么罪过？
t_en: What crime have we committed?

t_ch: 再说一次，我收到的只有大守护者的指示，审判罪行是裁判团的职责。
t_en: Let me repeat — all I received were the supreme guardian's instructions. It is for the adjudication panel to pass judgment on the accused.

t_ch: …大守护者只告诉我你们伪造了身份，目的是破坏筑城者对贝洛伯格的掌控。
t_en: ...All the supreme guardian told me was that your identities were counterfeit, and that your intention was to overthrow the rule of the Architects.

t_ch: 你知道星核在哪里吗？
t_en: Do you know where the Stellaron is?

t_ch: 我没有听说过什么「星核」，真的。
t_en: Truthfully, I've never heard of this Stellaron.

t_ch: 但如果一切灾厄只要封印了星核就能结束，我希望它是真实存在的……
t_en: But if all this catastrophe could be brought to an end simply by sealing it, then I hope its existence proves to be real.

t_ch: 银鬃铁卫为什么撤离了地下？
t_en: Why did the Silvermane Guards withdraw from the underground?

t_ch: 地上裂界的怪物活动加剧，前线战事吃紧，筑城者们不得不将所有的铁卫抽调到前线，用来抵御怪物入侵。
t_en: Fragmentum monster activity on the surface intensified, and hostilities on the front line were critical. To resist the invasion, the Architects had no choice but to redeploy the Guards to the front line.

t_ch: …如果不能保住地上的防线，地下就会因为失去物资支援而崩溃——大守护者是这么向我解释的。
t_en: ...If we couldn't hold our defensive line, then we wouldn't be able to maintain our supply of aid to the underground, which would have collapsed without us. That was the supreme guardian's explanation.

t_ch: 为什么愿意和我们合作？
t_en: Why are you willing to cooperate with us?

t_ch: 其实…一直以来，我总觉得有什么重要的事情被隐藏了起来。不管是筑城者，母亲还是银鬃铁卫的行动，总有些不自然的地方……
t_en: In truth... I've always felt like something important is being hidden. Whether it's the Architects, mother, or Silvermane Guards, there's always an... unnatural element to their actions.

t_ch: 自从和你们相遇，意外就接连发生，甚至来到了被封锁的地下……
t_en: Since encountering you, the unexpected seems to have arrived in waves. I never thought I'd enter the Underworld that has been sealed away for so long...

t_ch: 我有一种预感，和你们在一起，我能找到失落的线索——将我的疑惑解开。
t_en: I have a feeling that with you, I can pick up the lost threads... and dispel my uncertainties.

t_ch: 我问得差不多了。
t_en: That's all I have to ask.

t_ch: 嗯，该去会会「地火」了，走吧。
t_en: Mm, we should be going to see Wildfire. Let's move.

t_ch: 首次「开拓」之旅，还习惯吗？
t_en: How are you finding your first Trailblazing expedition?

t_ch: 习惯，冒险使我快乐！
t_en: Pretty great, I enjoy a good adventure!

t_ch: …那很好。
t_en: ...That's good.

t_ch: 感觉有点头晕转向。
t_en: I feel a bit discombobulated.

t_ch: 意外是旅途的一部分，这种情况时有发生。
t_en: All journeys contain their share of the unexpected. It won't be the last time.

t_ch: 开拓之旅？平平无奇。
t_en: Trailblazing expedition? Pretty unremarkable.

t_ch: …看来你很适应。
t_en: ...Sounds like you've taken it in your stride.

t_ch: 我打算整理一下目前的情报，你要听吗？
t_en: I'm about to summarize the intel we've gathered so far. Did you want to listen?

t_ch: 我也正有此意。
t_en: That's why I'm here.

t_ch: 算了吧，现在不想聊这个。
t_en: Uhh, maybe next time.

t_ch: 明白了，你可以随时来找我。
t_en: No problem, come find me any time.

t_ch: 首先是「下层区」——这是一个巨大的地下空间。矿民在此建立了城镇，开凿地髓。
t_en: First we have the Underworld — a huge underground space. Miners have built towns here and are excavating Geomarrow.

t_ch: 这里和「上层区」的关系是？
t_en: What's the relation between here and the Overworld?

t_ch: 从娜塔莎那里得知，下层区肩负了为整座城市供能的重任；曾经，在地下劳作的矿民很受尊重，和地上往来频繁。
t_en: We learned from Natasha that the Underworld shoulders the energy needs of their entire civilization. Laboring in the Underworld used to be a great honor, and there was regular movement between realms.

t_ch: 桑博提过一座「炉心」，人们通过那根柱子上下交通。而如今，上下层已经完全封锁了，只有地髓和物资的自动传输管道还在运转。
t_en: Sampo mentioned the Furnace Core, which people would use to travel in both directions. Yet now, each realm is sealed off from the other. Only the automatic transport line for Geomarrow and goods is still in operation.

t_ch: 「炉心」被封锁的详情还有待调查。除此之外，桑博似乎有一条来往上下层区的「门路」，是他的秘密，将来也许有用。
t_en: The reason for sealing the Furnace Core still needs to be investigated. In addition, it appears that Sampo has secret connections that grant him passage between here and the surface. That may come in useful to us.

t_ch: 上层的士兵不会到下面来吗？
t_en: Do soldiers from the Overworld ever come down here?

t_ch: 目前为止，除了被桑博带下来的布洛妮娅，我还没有在地下见到任何银鬃铁卫。
t_en: Up to now, apart from Bronya, whom Sampo brought here, I still haven't seen a single Silvermane Guard.

t_ch: 我在搏击俱乐部的时候听到了些只言片语，他们说铁卫在很多年前就撤离了地底，而且命令是由「大守护者」亲自下达的。
t_en: At the Fight Club I heard people say that the Guards withdrew from the underground many years ago, and that it was the supreme guardian who gave the order.

t_ch: 当时的大守护者正是可可利亚•兰德。
t_en: At the time, the supreme guardian was none other than Cocolia Rand.

t_ch: 我已经清楚了，继续吧。
t_en: I'm clear on this bit. What else?

t_ch: 算了，之后再继续讨论吧。
t_en: Uhh, that'll do for now.

t_ch: 明白了，你可以随时来找我。
t_en: No problem, come find me any time.

t_ch: 接下来是我们的目标——星核。
t_en: Next we have our goal — the Stellaron.

t_ch: 在表明意图之后，「大守护者」中断了对话，随后派兵捉拿我们。如今想来，她当时的态度确有蹊跷。
t_en: After we revealed our intentions, the supreme guardian suspended communications and sent soldiers to arrest us. Her reaction was strange, to say the least.

t_ch: 「大守护者」为何这么做？
t_en: Why did the supreme guardian choose to act that way?

t_ch: 现在还不好说，她的反应过于激进了，说明我们的言语中一定有什么触碰到了她严防死守的秘密。
t_en: It's too early to say, but it was a radical move. It means that we must have broached a highly sensitive subject... a secret that she's sparing no effort to protect.

t_ch: 我回忆交涉内容，可能性大约有两个方向：「筑城者」或「星核」。我倾向于后者，但缺乏进一步的证据。
t_en: If I remember our discussion correctly, I think there are two main possibilities: The Architects, and the Stellaron. I'm inclined to think it's the latter, but we lack evidence.

t_ch: 「下层区」会有星核的线索吗？
t_en: Will we find any Stellaron clues in the Underworld?

t_ch: 有一句古话叫「祸兮福所倚，福兮祸所伏」。地下的历史与地上一样悠久，并且没有大守护者的干预，我们很有机会查出星核的所在。
t_en: There's an old saying that goes: "Good fortune lies within bad, bad fortune lurks within good." Even when compared with the Overworld, the Underworld has a long history. There should be valuable intel here. Not to mention, without the supreme guardian's interference, we have a better chance than ever of locating the Stellaron.

t_ch: 我已经清楚了，继续吧。
t_en: I'm clear on this bit. What else?

t_ch: 算了，之后再继续讨论吧。
t_en: Uhh, that'll do for now.

t_ch: 明白了，你可以随时来找我。
t_en: No problem, come find me any time.
